source: NSE official RSS (nsearchives.nseindia.com) — corporate announcements, not general market news

recent_announcements.summary: The Exchange had sought clarification from Ethos Limited for the quarter ended 30-Sep-2025 with respect to Regulation 33 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. On basis of above the Company was required to clarify the following:   The response of the Company is enclosed. |SUBJECT: Reply to Clarification- Financial results
TVS Motor Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'AGM updates - Intimation of One-Way Live Webcast Link of the proceedings of 34th Annual General Meeting'. |SUBJECT: Updates

Kay Cee Energy & Infra Limited has informed regarding Submission of the Non-Applicability of Regulation 27(2) as per Regulation 15 of Chapter IV of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 for the Quarter ended June 30, 2026. |SUBJECT: Quarterly Compliance Report on Corporate governance - within 21 days from the end of the quarter

ALMONDZ GLOBAL SECURITIES LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Board Meeting to be held on 28-Jul-2026 to inter-alia consider and approve the Unaudited Financial results of the Company for the Quarterly ended June 2026 . |SUBJECT: Board Meeting Intimation
Kalyani Steels Limited has informed the Exchange that Record date for the purpose of Dividend  is 31-Jul-2026. |SUBJECT: Record Date

ASPINWALL AND COMPANY LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Board Meeting to be held on 05-Aug-2026 to inter-alia consider and approve the Unaudited Financial results of the Company for the Quarterly ended June 2026 . |SUBJECT: Board Meeting Intimation
